summary: Iter 35 - Tested Seed Demo Data endpoint + 3 code-review quick wins (BSON datetime in waitlist_admin_alerts, reset_demo_data error handling with partial/errors, APP_URL warning in email_service) + regression. 16/16 backend pytest cases PASSED. Frontend SuperAdminPanel verified: both Seed Demo and Reset Demo buttons render on expanded TenantCard with correct data-testids.
critical_code_review_comments: demo_seed_service.py stores dates as .isoformat() strings in products/waitlist/leads/conversations/messages while the iter35 fix rightly switched waitlist_admin_alerts.sent_at to native datetime — consider unifying: the rest of the collections also query by date ranges in other services (demand, coach) and string dates won't sort correctly once epochs cross month boundaries.

maybe_alert_superadmin (waitlist_alert_service.py) uses find_one cooldown check then insert_one without atomic upsert — under race conditions two concurrent callers could both send the alert. Low risk but consider replace_one(upsert=True) with filter on composite key.

SeedDemoRequest has no upper bounds on products_count / waitlist_per_product — a superadmin could pass large numbers. Dataset sample is capped by dataset length so products_count is safe, but consider validating 1<=n<=100 via Pydantic Field.
seed_data_creation: Used test-pizzeria-e2e tenant for seed/reset cycles; cleaned up after tests. demo-inmobiliaria NOT touched per instructions (user wants clean onboarding).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 backend tests in test_iter35_seed_demo.py pass. Frontend SuperAdminPanel: click a tenant-{id} card to expand, then seed-demo-{id} and reset-demo-{id} buttons render. Both endpoints (seed-demo-data and reset-demo-data) return proper shapes (partial bool, skipped idempotency, template_used varying per template_id). waitlist_admin_alerts.sent_at is now BSON datetime (cooldown verified idempotent). APP_URL warning log verified in both send_upsell_unmet_demand and send_waitlist_threshold_alert.
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs found. Initial test writing issues (wrong function names, response shape assumptions for /auth/onboarding/status -> returns 'completed' not 'onboarding_completed') were corrected in the test file.
